news.title:
Varroc Engineering redeemed Rs. 50 crore Commercial Papers on Feb 27, 2026.
Payment made to Kotak Mahindra Bank; compliance with SEBI debt guidelines.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering redeemed Rs. 50 crore Commercial Papers on Feb 27, 2026.
Payment made to Kotak Mahindra Bank; compliance with SEBI debt guidelines.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering announces early redemption of 8.6% NCDs worth ₹250 Cr.
Call option exercised; record date set to Feb 13, 2026, with redemption by Mar 7, 2026.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering announces early redemption of 8.6% NCDs worth ₹250 Cr.
Call option exercised; record date set to Feb 13, 2026, with redemption by Mar 7, 2026.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering's arbitration claim by OP Mobility reduced from 66.4M to 25.4M.
Claims pertain to alleged 2022 agreement breaches; Varroc may contest and file counterclaims.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering's arbitration claim by OP Mobility reduced from 66.4M to 25.4M.
Claims pertain to alleged 2022 agreement breaches; Varroc may contest and file counterclaims.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering targets 15-20% revenue growth and zero debt by FY27.
The company plans a Rs.150M land investment to achieve its targets.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering targets 15-20% revenue growth and zero debt by FY27.
The company plans a Rs.150M land investment to achieve its targets.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering reported no deviation in fund utilization for Q3 FY 2025-26.
The Rs. 50 Cr raised via Commercial Paper was fully utilized as stated in the offer document.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering reported no deviation in fund utilization for Q3 FY 2025-26.
The Rs. 50 Cr raised via Commercial Paper was fully utilized as stated in the offer document.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering to redeem Rs. 250 Cr NCDs early with 8.6% interest.
Call option for March 7, 2026; record date set for Feb 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering to redeem Rs. 250 Cr NCDs early with 8.6% interest.
Call option for March 7, 2026; record date set for Feb 13, 2026.

news.title: Varroc Engineering Q3 profit before exceptional items rose to ₹1B from ₹661M YoY.
news.summary: Varroc Engineering Q3 profit before exceptional items rose to ₹1B from ₹661M YoY.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering approved unaudited Q3 and 9M results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Call option on debentures exercised; updates on arbitration and GST cases shared.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering approved unaudited Q3 and 9M results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Call option on debentures exercised; updates on arbitration and GST cases shared.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering secures a 6-year contract to supply AC bi-directional chargers to a global EV OEM.
Chargers will be made in Romania; annual business value estimated at ₹4391M-₹48M.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering secures a 6-year contract to supply AC bi-directional chargers to a global EV OEM.
Chargers will be made in Romania; annual business value estimated at ₹4391M-₹48M.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering issued Rs. 50 Cr Commercial Paper with a 7.2% discount rate.
The CP is proposed to be listed on NSE; awaiting listing approval.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering issued Rs. 50 Cr Commercial Paper with a 7.2% discount rate.
The CP is proposed to be listed on NSE; awaiting listing approval.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering announced partial redemption of NCDs, reducing face value from Rs.1,00,000 to Rs.68,750.
Next redemption will lower NCD face value to Rs.62,500; payments follow agreed schedule including interest.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering announced partial redemption of NCDs, reducing face value from Rs.1,00,000 to Rs.68,750.
Next redemption will lower NCD face value to Rs.62,500; payments follow agreed schedule including interest.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering redeemed Rs. 50 crore CPs on Jan 27, 2026.
The CPs were issued on Jan 1, 2026, with Kotak Mahindra Bank as the investor.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering redeemed Rs. 50 crore CPs on Jan 27, 2026.
The CPs were issued on Jan 1, 2026, with Kotak Mahindra Bank as the investor.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering to hold Board Meeting on Feb 5, 2026, to review Q3 FY2025-26 financial results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1 to Feb 7, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering to hold Board Meeting on Feb 5, 2026, to review Q3 FY2025-26 financial results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1 to Feb 7, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering introduced a Voluntary Retirement Scheme (VRS) with 411 applications accepted.
The total payout for the scheme is approximately INR 79.9 crore, benefiting workers and the company.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering introduced a Voluntary Retirement Scheme (VRS) with 411 applications accepted.
The total payout for the scheme is approximately INR 79.9 crore, benefiting workers and the company.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering issued Rs. 50 Cr commercial paper to Kotak Mahindra Bank.
The CP matures in 26 days at a 6.7% discount rate; NSE listing pending.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering issued Rs. 50 Cr commercial paper to Kotak Mahindra Bank.
The CP matures in 26 days at a 6.7% discount rate; NSE listing pending.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering Ltd informed NSE & BSE about newspaper ads on Postal Ballot Results.
This complies with Regulation 30 & 47 of SEBI Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering Ltd informed NSE & BSE about newspaper ads on Postal Ballot Results.
This complies with Regulation 30 & 47 of SEBI Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering approved standalone and consolidated Q2 FY25 results, with revenue at Rs. 20,378.6M.
Auditors flagged income recognition issues; arbitration and GST disputes are under review without provisions yet.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering approved standalone and consolidated Q2 FY25 results, with revenue at Rs. 20,378.6M.
Auditors flagged income recognition issues; arbitration and GST disputes are under review without provisions yet.

news.title:
Investec upgrades Varroc Engineering target to Rs 800, citing growth acceleration, 13% revenue CAGR FY25-28, and 26% EPS CAGR.
ICICI Securities maintains 'Buy' with Rs 745 target, expects 12% revenue CAGR FY25-28 and EBITDA margin improvement to 10.5-10.7%.
news.summary:
Investec upgrades Varroc Engineering target to Rs 800, citing growth acceleration, 13% revenue CAGR FY25-28, and 26% EPS CAGR.
ICICI Securities maintains 'Buy' with Rs 745 target, expects 12% revenue CAGR FY25-28 and EBITDA margin improvement to 10.5-10.7%.

news.title:
Varroc Engineering Ltd announces an analyst/investor meet on Dec 3, 2025.
The virtual meeting with Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund will use public data, excluding UPSI.
news.summary:
Varroc Engineering Ltd announces an analyst/investor meet on Dec 3, 2025.
The virtual meeting with Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund will use public data, excluding UPSI.

news.title: Varroc Engineering secures a major deal for high voltage e-powertrain parts with an EV manufacturer.
news.summary: Varroc Engineering secures a major deal for high voltage e-powertrain parts with an EV manufacturer.
